title: Ladies' Night
why_this_song: Ladies' Night by Kool & the Gang (1979) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 76 times; first heard in: "Oh, what a night"
Appears 37 times; first heard in: "Stay with me tonight mama, yeah"
Appears 36 times; first heard in: "Everything's gonna be alright"
Appears 36 times; first heard in: "Everything's gonna be alright"
Appears 22 times; first heard in: "Oh, yes, it's ladies' night"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "night" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "night" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "tonight" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Ladies' Night", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Ladies' Night", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Ladies' Night" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Ladies' Night" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Ladies' Night" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Ladies' Night", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
